runs.title: should verify that fixed helpers work with API mocking
should use correct selector and debug model population
should mock OpenAI API and verify complete model flow
summary messages: button present on summary when not last
single message: no delete-all-below button
regular messages: button present on all but last message
should test the complete E2E flow with proper expansion
Settings: min height can be changed and persists
Settings: checkbox state persists across page reloads
Settings: max height can be changed and persists
Up/Down navigates between message anchors
TEST 4: Draft Persistence Through New Chat
TEST 5: Rapid New Chat Clicking
Textarea uses min height as initial height
reasoning window reopens and minimizes correctly for consecutive messages
new conversation should use custom system prompt set in Settings
should examine DOM changes when clicking QuickSettings
should verify original E2E test pattern works
TEST 7: Topbar New Chat Button
Textarea respects max height setting when expanding
TEST 6: Complex Text Preservation
Settings: max height has default value of 288
Settings: shows textarea height controls
TEST 1: Basic New Chat Button Preserves Input
Settings: min height has default value of 96
Settings: min height input has valid bounds (32-200)
Settings: max height input has valid bounds (100-600)
new conversation should use default prompt when Settings prompt is unchanged
should clear input after conversation with messages
Non-reasoning model shows no RW, reasoning model shows RW
textarea remains visible after auto-expand on mobile viewport
OpenAI: with auto-collapse disabled, reasoning window stays open when response completes
Quick Settings: checkbox appears for reasoning models and syncs with Settings
OpenAI: with auto-collapse enabled, reasoning window closes when response completes
extreme case - very long message with simulated keyboard
Settings: checkbox is not visible when non-reasoning model is selected
Settings: checkbox appears when reasoning model is selected and defaults to checked
Anthropic: with auto-collapse disabled, reasoning window stays open when response completes
textarea scrolls into view when expanding on constrained desktop viewport
Anthropic: with auto-collapse enabled, reasoning window closes when response completes
viewport remains stable while streaming
should boot without JavaScript errors
OpenAI: after deleting a reasoning message, a new one produces exactly one window
reasoning window streams content and reaches done on a longer prompt
reasoning panels should be removed when delete-all-below is clicked
RW placement remains stable when new messages are added
should maintain input box state after rapid button clicks
should have a valid favicon href that loads successfully
gpt-5.1 shows "none" option, hides "minimal" in Settings
provider settings persist across page reloads
new user can open Settings and configure API key
reasoning window renders and panel reaches done
app boots successfully with corrupted anthropic_api_key in localStorage
should show "WolfeChat" for new conversation without title
should find model selection in Quick Settings area
app boots successfully with completely empty localStorage
should find what elements exist on page
should expand QuickSettings and find model dropdown
RW appear with reasoning content and bind to correct message
app boots successfully with corrupted api_key in localStorage
should examine QuickSettings component source
reasoning window auto-minimizes after assistant starts replying
app boots with various malformed localStorage values
should show "WolfeChat: [chat title]" when conversation has a title
app boots successfully with corrupted openai_api_key in localStorage
gpt-5.1 shows "none" option, hides "minimal" in Quick Settings
gpt-5-nano shows "minimal" option, hides "none" in Settings
sequential sends clear input after each message
Highlighting persists across updated content (append within same block)
API key field maintains separate values for each provider
Prism tokens present during and after stream for fenced block
TEST 2: Multiple Conversations Input Preservation
visual grouping container exists around provider settings
isolated per chat across content sizes
should clear input when clicking Clear Chat button in sidebar
TEST 3: New Chat vs Clear Chat Behavior Difference
can type text into input field
provider dropdown has correct options and default selection
visiting empty chat does not reset other chats
should clear input when clicking Clear Chat button in QuickSettings
can send a prompt and receive a mocked response
should clear input with multi-line text
mode selection dropdown is not visible
should clear input with partially typed message
should clear input with special characters and emojis
does not override custom title
should clear input when clicking New Chat button in mobile topbar
gpt-5-nano shows "minimal" option, hides "none" in Quick Settings
provider switching preserves other settings
API key field label changes based on selected provider
sanitizes quotes and Title: prefix
switching empty->long restores saved ratio
sets title from Responses output after first reply

app boots and chat UI renders
should clear input when clicking New Chat button in sidebar
scroll container maintains position when streaming placeholder grows
